What we offer

Three service lines,
one guiding principle.

Every engagement is built around your goals — not ours.

Financial Planning

Comprehensive planning for Massachusetts residents — retirement, tax strategy, cash flow, and life transitions. Priced transparently as an hourly or flat fee.

Investment Management

Disciplined, low-cost portfolio management aligned with your financial plan. Fees based on a percentage of assets managed — nothing hidden.

Outsourced CIO for Non-Profits

Institutional-quality investment oversight for local non-profit organizations — investment policy, manager selection, and ongoing governance support.

Why Cigale Finance

Built differently,
by design.

The financial industry is full of conflicts of interest. Cigale was founded to offer something genuinely different — advice that is structurally required to serve you first.

01

Fiduciary, always

As a licensed investment advisor representative, Joffrey is legally and ethically required to act in your best interest at all times.

02

No commissions, ever

Cigale cannot earn commissions on products recommended. Compensation flows only from you — as an hourly fee, flat fee, or percentage of assets managed.

03

Fully independent

No affiliations with investment companies or product sponsors. Every recommendation is built solely around what's right for your situation.

The founder

Joffrey K. Bremond

Founder & Principal Advisor

Cigale Financial Services was founded in 2024 with a mission to bring fee-only, fiduciary financial advice to the residents of Massachusetts and the non-profit organizations that serve our community. Joffrey holds a B.S. in Business Management & Economics and an M.S. in Accountancy from Westfield State University, and brings over a decade of experience in accounting as an auditor, financial reporting manager, controller, and director of finance.

CPA MSA Series 65 Shrewsbury, MA
